topic.title: Assignment 4 Deadline Extension
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Good news! The deadline for Assignment 4 has been extended to Monday, February 9th at 11:59 PM.

If you’ve already submitted, feel free to use this extra time to review your work and strengthen anything that might need more detail. Think of it as a chance to polish and fill in any gaps before the final deadline.

Please note that no further extensions will be provided, so plan accordingly and make the most of the additional time. Let me know if you have any questions!

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
